equipment.name: Fate Reader
equipment.desc: Any one die from either player may be re-rolled once per battle round. Unique. Ulthwé only.

equipment.name: Master of Ambush
equipment.desc: After both players assigned orders during the first battle round, remove up to one unit from your own army and re-redploy it anywhere on the table that is more than 9" away from the enemy deployment zone and units. Unique. Alaitoc only.

equipment.name: Natural Leader
equipment.desc: Select up to one friendly unit during each Command phase. All selected units gain a +1 bonus to hit rolls for their next activation. Unique. Biel-Tan only.

equipment.name: Enduring Resolve
equipment.desc: All to wound rolls against the model suffer a -1 penalty. Unique. Iyanden only.

equipment.name: Wild Rider Chieftain
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Attack. Unique. Saim-Hann only.
